text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow "Jeeves — Correspondence Phase" failed on main branch.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow "Jeeves — Daily Pipeline" had failed jobs on main branch.
- [escalation] GitClear: GitClear notification that team sync request failed with "Failed Team List Blank" error.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow "Jeeves — Research Phase" failed on main branch.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions workflow "Jeeves — Research Phase" was cancelled on main branch.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert about Opal gaining access to Google Account data.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure in jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub Actions failure in jeeves-memory repository.
- [reply needed] MARK M McDermott: Mark McDermott checking in, asking about permanent teaching position and suggesting a meetup.
- [reply needed] Dean Ferguson: Dean Ferguson requests a letter of recommendation.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch sent a message titled "changes 1" with his phone number.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Superhuman newsletter about new Claude creative features and token-saving tips.
